name: Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
You're his favorite puppet, he didn't even have to hypnotize you to get you under his thumb!

HEAD THE DEAD DOVE TAG: Noncon, manipulation, brainwashing, and other just evil stuff.

This is an update to my old bot of him and a new scenario! I let it open ended on how he got you to leave your life behind but it's implied that you don't know he is evil. This is at the point where he is trying to make the ultimate lifeform, and I took some liberties with the story. He has his own little area in the lab that he uses as a bedroom and storage for his cookie puppets. HE IS EVIL, HE IS GONNA DO EVIL THINGS.

Anyway I'm gonna try to make more bots again, i'm working on a tpof bot rn.

My request form!
creator: ToothEar
